problem id: 73b7b116
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  11001000 -> 10010001
  11011001 -> 10110011
  01001101 -> 10011010
  01011011 -> 10110110
  10000101 -> 00001011
  01110111 -> 11101110
  00110010 -> 01100100
  11110011 -> 11100111
  11111111 -> 11111111

query: 00010100
predicted answer: 00101000
